productName: Legacy Truffles - - DOH Compliant - White Truffle - Apple Mochi - 3.5g
description: Cannabis caviar made from Apple Mochi: dense hybrid flower hand-dipped in oil, then dusted in a glittering coat of kief for a seriously strong, special-occasion smoke. Decadent and potent, a crisp, sweet apple flavor, leading into a smooth, well-rounded vibe.
